untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fuzzy logic pattern recognition for evening star (gap detection) and dark cloud (midpoint comparison) formations. These complex multi-bar relative comparisons with gap logic and midpoint calculations cannot be expressed using only the allowed binary comparison operators and indicators. The signal specifically relies on fuzzy membership functions rather than crisp thresholds.
translation_notes: Bullish engulfing pattern translated as basic engulfing (current body > previous range, close > open, previous close < previous open). Evening star and dark cloud patterns require gap detection and complex relative positioning that exceeds the scope of binary rule operators. Fuzzy logic methodology cannot be replicated in deterministic rule syntax.
